source_ref.non_target_image_cache_note: node:20 was present locally, but it does not satisfy the frontend/web/Dockerfile node:22-alpine requirement.

notes: The 211 packaged frontend smoke was rechecked for runtime subject 6088d5d and remains blocked_environment with docker_registry_proxy_unreachable and base_image_pull_failed.

This is reviewed blocker evidence only, not release acceptance. It records that the source files and compose overlay are present, but the Docker-capable host cannot pull node:22-alpine or nginx:1.27-alpine and no target frontend image is cached.
The evidence intentionally redacts the registry proxy endpoint, raw daemon failure text, host paths, env-file values, credentials, and secret-like runtime material.
open_followups: Restore or bypass the 211 Docker registry proxy, or stage reviewed node:22-alpine and nginx:1.27-alpine base images on a Docker-capable host.

After the environment is fixed, rerun tools/frontend_packaged_runtime_smoke.py with a complete operator evidence JSON and record ready_for_operator_review evidence before closing packaged_frontend_image_release_acceptance.
This evidence does not close G6, G9, #17 packaged frontend release acceptance, compose one-command startup, or any production rollout gate.
